clusters.title: This Place: The story of the Birrarung, the Yarra River
clusters.neutral_headline: This Place: The story of the Birrarung, the Yarra River

items.title: This Place: The story of the Birrarung, the Yarra River
items.standfirst: Yalukit Willam man of the Boonwurrung — Jaeden Williams-Briggs —tells the story of the Birrarung, known as the Yarra River. The only way to cross the Birrarung was the Rock Falls which was a sacred place. The walk was part of the celebrations for the seven magical sisters. NAIDOC Week is marking 50 years of Deadly and runs from July 5 until July 12.
items.content: Yalukit Willam man of the Boonwurrung — Jaeden Williams-Briggs —tells the story of the Birrarung, known as the Yarra River. The only way to cross the Birrarung was the Rock Falls which was a sacred place. The walk was part of the celebrations for the seven magical sisters. NAIDOC Week is marking 50 years of Deadly and runs from July 5 until July 12.
